title: Boolean prop combinations are hard to test
message: Component "TaskCard" takes 4 on/off props (isCompleted, isActive, isLocked…), which is hard to combine & test. Split it into smaller components or named variants.
help: Split boolean-heavy APIs into smaller components or named variants so combinations stay testable.
